title: Senior Data Engineer
summary: 8 years building large-scale data pipelines. Migrated a 10 TB Hadoop cluster to AWS S3 and Redshift using Spark and Airflow DAGs. Owns pipelines end-to-end including SLA monitoring and incident response.
experience: Currently at a Series C fintech building the data platform from scratch. Led a team of 3 engineers. Previously at an e-commerce company processing 500M events/day with PySpark on EMR. Built dbt models for a 50-table dimensional warehouse.

counterfactual.ceiling: At skill ceiling — no required skills missing.

reason: Candidate has direct experience migrating a large-scale data pipeline to AWS and using Spark, Airflow, and dbt.

title: Data Engineer
summary: 5 years in data engineering. Built end-to-end batch and streaming pipelines on AWS. Strong ownership mindset — fixes things even when they're not mine.
experience: At a logistics company: designed Airflow-orchestrated Spark jobs ingesting 200M records/day from Kafka into S3 and Glue. Mentored 2 junior engineers on pipeline best practices. Led migration from cron jobs to Airflow.

reason: The candidate has experience with Airflow-orchestrated Spark jobs, AWS (S3, Glue), Kafka, and Python. They also demonstrate a strong ownership mindset.

title: ML Engineer

title: Analytics Associate

experience: Despite the junior title, I own the data pipeline completely. Built Apache Airflow DAGs to ingest data from 5 source systems into AWS S3. Wrote Python and PySpark jobs for transformation. Set up AWS Glue crawlers and Athena tables. Also built dbt models for the analytics layer. Presented pipeline architecture to the CTO.
education: B.Com (Hons), Shri Ram College of Commerce
